description: Style Noteyork perfumes are known for its sophisticated fragrances and it's value for money. No ensemble is complete without the right fragrance and york has a flavour for every season. Emit the aura of a diva without burning a hole in your pocket. Encased in a delectable flacon, this perfume is a wardrobe essential this summer.Product DetailsAmazing for women by York comes in a curvy glass flaconCautionDo not spray near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying on eyesSize50 ml
